_meta.title: Data, Energy, and Cost Ceilings
_meta.note: Ceiling values are projections with uncertainty intervals.

ceilings.label: Data Wall
ceilings.note: Public text ceiling. Upper bound ~20 quadrillion tokens with multimodal + synthetic.

ceilings.label: Power Wall
ceilings.note: Individual training-run power draw. IEA projects global data-center electricity 415→945 TWh by 2030.

ceilings.label: Duration Ceiling
ceilings.note: Frontier training runs face a ~9-month practical ceiling.

ceilings.label: Cost Wall
ceilings.note: Training compute costs are doubling every 8 months for the largest models.

caveats: Epoch's upper bound for data is ~20 quadrillion effective tokens once multimodal and synthetic are included.
Reasoning models trade training-compute scaling for test-time compute scaling, which has a different physical profile.
IEA's AI share of data centers is itself uncertain.
